evals.prompt: /agent-resources-coworker — audit the agent roster and tell me if anything is broken
evals.expected_output: Reads manifest.json, cross-checks filesystem for all 11 coworkers, writes agent-roster artifact, transitions queue entry to completed

evals.prompt: I want to add a new qa-coworker to the system. It should handle test automation and quality gates. Use claude-haiku, protocols a2a and e2m-mcp, peers with engineering-coworker and product-management-coworker.
evals.expected_output: Creates SKILL.md for qa-coworker following the engineering-coworker pattern, adds manifest entry, creates empty mailbox and queue files, sends welcome task, routes outcome to product-management-coworker

evals.prompt: Check the agent-resources mailbox for pending work and process whatever's there
evals.expected_output: Reads mailbox JSONL, identifies pending messages, claims highest-priority task, executes it, writes transition, acks the mailbox message
